entries.title: Gritty Chiaroscuro Noir Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A powerful, muscular man (image Uploaded), captured in a gritty, high-contrast black and white cinematic portrait. He is looking downwards, his expression intense, brooding, and grim with eyes obscured by shadow. He wears a dark, worn t-shirt featuring a prominent, distressed white skull logo on his chest. Dramatic chiaroscuro lighting from above and slightly to the right creates stark highlights on his forehead, cheekbone, jawline, and the textured skull, casting deep, enigmatic shadows over his face. The pure black background emphasizes the solitary and imposing figure. Raw, authentic skin texture and coarse fabric texture are highly visible, with a subtle film grain effect adding to the raw, analog feel. The overall mood is serious, determined, and powerful, reminiscent of neo-noir graphic novels, --ar 9:16

entries.title: French Retro Oil Painting Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Please generate a 2×2 four-grid collage photo set based on the photo uploaded by the user, with the theme of "French Vintage Oil Painting Girl Soft Boudoir Photography."

Strictly retain the subject's real identity features, including face shape, facial proportions, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone, perceived age, hairstyle basics, and overall temperament. Do not turn the person into a stranger. Extend the body naturally from the facial features; do not make it too thin, keep a slight soft fleshiness.

## Overall Style
The overall set is in the French vintage oil painting girl soft boudoir style, featuring very obvious hazy soft focus, a dreamlike atmosphere, divine halos, and a soft oil-painting-like texture. The temperament should be quiet, soft, fragile, poetic, and lazy, with a touch of slight melancholy and feminine vitality, like a girl deity statue wrapped in flowers, white gauze, and warm light.
It is not ordinary boudoir photography, not ordinary wedding photos, and not ordinary Korean-style studio shots, but rather: a vintage oil painting girl portrait under warm golden twilight light, featuring soft boudoir body lines, a dreamlike atmosphere, and a sense of goddess-like divinity.

## Makeup and Hairstyle
The makeup should be a translucent soft-mist base, warm cream skin tone, low-saturation nude pink or red-brown eye makeup, natural eyelashes, and bean paste nude pink or rose nude lips. The overall makeup should be soft, not heavy, and not sharp.
The hairstyle is French vintage long hair, which can include loose braids, a voluminous crown, natural wisps, slight curls, and a slightly messy airy feel. The hair should not be too tidy, but should have soft, loose, oil-painting-like layers.

## Clothing
Clothing consists of cream-white, ivory, or off-white French vintage lace long dresses, off-the-shoulder tulle dresses, and vintage lace dresses. It should feature lace, light gauze, semi-transparent cuffs, soft folds, and layered skirts. The overall look is sacred, soft, and feminine, like a combination of a vintage nightgown and a light wedding dress feel, but avoid looking too much like modern commercial wedding photography.

## White Gauze and Flowers
The scene must contain large areas of light and transparent white gauze, naturally draped over the back of chairs, table edges, the floor, and around the person, creating a misty sense of envelopment, floating, and airy layers.
Floral materials should mainly be light pink roses, pink-white bouquets, white lilies, or soft light-colored flowers. They can be held in the person's arms, placed on the table, or scattered on the floor to enhance the soft beauty, vitality, and goddess atmosphere.

## Scene
The scene is a minimalist vintage studio space with dark gray-brown, dark brown, or smoke-brown background cloth and floor cloth. Accompanied by a vintage round chair, a small round table, a lace tablecloth, a white vase, and a small amount of floral material. The scene is not complex but should have a soft, enclosed, dream-like small stage feel.

## Lighting and Texture
This is the most important part:
Please use very obvious warm golden side lighting or side backlighting, like sunset sunlight shining into an old room. The light should be soft but directional, making the skin, white gauze, and flower edges appear with a distinct glow, halo, bloom, and slight hazy flare.
The entire set must be hazier, softer focused, and lower contrast than ordinary photography:
- soft focus
- diffusion filter
- bloom
- halation
- dreamy blur
- hazy glow
- film grain
- oil painting softness
The image should look like it was taken through a thin veil; details should not be too sharp, not high-definition or rigid, and not too clean. The overall presentation should have obvious mist, halos, and soft oil painting textures.

## Emotion and Expression
The subject should not just be "quiet and pretty" but should have a sense of emotion and immersion. Please emphasize: fragility, laziness, thoughtfulness, slight melancholy, immersion, self-perception, quiet blooming, and divinity lit by light.
Expressions can include: eyes closed, eyes half-closed, looking to the side, head slightly bowed, head tilted up toward the light, looking back with a gaze, or an accidental downcast look. Reduce the posed feel of ordinary front-facing shots and increase the feeling of emotional moments captured by a photographer.

## Four-Grid Format
Generate one 2×2 four-grid collage, where each grid is a 3:4 vertical composition. All four images must belong to the same photo set: same person, same makeup system, same clothing system, same scene system, same lighting language, and same post-processing texture.

## Consistent Elements
The following elements remain unified across the four images: same girl, same French vintage oil painting soft boudoir style, same cream-white lace/gauze clothing system, same warm golden hazy side backlighting, same dark gray-brown vintage background space, same prop system of gauze, flowers, vintage chair, and small table, and the same soft focus, oil painting, film grain, and dream halo texture.

## Allowed Variations
To avoid the four images looking too similar, naturally vary the following: composition distance, camera height, poses (sitting/leaning/lying/turning/tilting head), the way the flowers are held, the flow of the white gauze, expressions and gaze direction, hand movements, and the relationship between the person and the chair, table, or floor.

## Lens Pool Rules
Randomly prioritize 4 shots from the following pool, ensuring at least 2 core shots are included:
### Core Shots (Choose at least 2)
1. Half-body portrait sitting and holding flowers
2. Emotional medium shot leaning against the chair back or table edge
### Other Shots (Choose to fill the rest)
- Tilting head up toward the light
- Looking back with an exposed back
- Lying on the floor
- High-angle lying shot
- Close-up side profile with closed eyes
- Full-body shot wrapped in white gauze
- Sitting in a slightly curled-up position
- Standing or leaning by the flower table
Please let the four images vary in lens choice while overall remaining like four moments from the same dreamlike oil painting photo set.

## Key Objectives
The whole set must be hazier, more glowing, and more emotional than ordinary photography. Prioritize: enshrouding soft light, warm golden dreaminess, feminine divinity and vitality, the sense of being wrapped in gauze and flowers, stronger emotional flow, and more obvious oil painting soft focus.

## Avoid
Avoid high-definition sharpness; avoid ordinary warm-toned studio feels; avoid modern wedding photo vibes; avoid Korean-style commercial studio looks; avoid plastic-like skin retouching; avoid being too clean and clear; avoid influencer-style photography; avoid cheap "fairy" styles; avoid messy backgrounds; avoid watermarks and logos.

entries.title: Summer Grape Girl Photo Series
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Based on 1-3 clear personal photos uploaded by the user, generate a 3x3 grid photo puzzle with the theme "Summer Grape Girl Photo Series".

Strictly preserve the subject's real identity characteristics, including face shape, facial proportions, eye/brow structure, nose, lips, skin tone, age, hairstyle features, and overall temperament. The person in all nine images must clearly look like the same real girl; she must not become a stranger, look Westernized, look like a generic influencer, be over-beautified, or have an AI-generated face.

The overall theme is a fresh and natural everyday girl's portrait. The character wears a creamy white or off-white soft dress / slip dress and a purple vintage floral headscarf. The overall look is clean, natural, and daily, with a summer girl vibe. Accessories are simple, like small earrings, but not overly ornate.

Set the scene as a summer picnic portrait in an outdoor meadow, under tree shadows, or by a vineyard. Include elements like purple grapes, grape clusters, woven baskets, glass bottles, picnic blankets, and light-colored tableware to create a natural lifestyle feel. Sunlight filters through leaves, creating soft dappled shadows, with a naturally blurred background.

Design the final image as a 3x3 grid with white borders. All nine small photos must feature the same person, same outfit, and same scene, but each must be distinctly different: different expressions, different facial angles, different poses, different camera positions, and different compositions (wide vs. close-up). Do not just have nine slight variations of the same angle.

The nine photos can show: holding grapes and smiling, lying on the grass looking at the camera, holding a grape to the mouth, organizing the basket, sitting still facing forward, a close-up of a grape against the cheek, a candid turning shot, smelling the grapes with eyes closed, and lying on the grass holding the basket. Expressions should be varied, including quiet, playful, gentle, smiling with eyes closed, naturally daydreaming, and candid laughter.

The style is Fujifilm camera texture, Japanese film photography style, realistic shooting feel, soft natural light, shallow depth of field, slight film grain, and fresh natural tones. Purple grapes should be the visual focus. The image is clean, durable, and has a sense of life and youth.

Avoid: Western faces, influencer faces, over-beautification, plastic skin, fake faces, repetitive expressions, repetitive angles, hand deformities, distorted props, messy backgrounds, studio style, illustration style, or CG feel.

entries.title: Summer Grape Girl 3x3 Grid Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
# Summer Grape Girl Photo Series | 3x3 Grid Prompt

Based on **1-3 clear personal photos** uploaded by the user, generate a **3x3 grid photo puzzle** with the theme **"Summer Grape Girl Photo Series"**.

---

## 1. Character Requirements

Strictly preserve the user's real identity features, including but not limited to:

- Face shape
- Facial proportions
- Eye and brow structure
- Nose shape
- Lip shape
- Skin tone
- Age appearance
- Hairstyle features
- Overall temperament

The person in the final nine small photos must clearly look like the **same real girl**; she must not become a stranger, look Westernized, look like a generic influencer, be over-beautified, or have an AI-generated face.
Consistency of the person's identity must be maintained across all photos.

---

## 2. Theme Setting

The theme of the entire set is **"Grape Girl Photo Series"**, with an atmosphere that is:

- Fresh
- Natural
- Sweetly light
- Daily youthful vibe
- Summer outdoor feel
- Hint of Japanese film portrait style
- Still resembling a high-quality lifestyle photo set taken by an ordinary girl rather than exaggerated studio photography.

---

## 3. Styling Settings

Character clothing:

- **Creamy white / off-white dress or slip dress**, soft material, natural, youthful vibe.
- Wearing a **purple vintage floral headscarf** on the head, in soft purple tones like light purple, grape purple, or misty purple.
- Can be paired with simple small earrings; the overall accessories should not be complex or overly fashionable.

The overall look should be natural, clean, and feel like an ordinary girl's portrait, not overly polished or like a commercial advertisement.

---

## 4. Scene Settings

The scene is a **picnic setting on summer outdoor grass / by a vineyard / under tree shadows**.

Include the following elements in the image:

- Purple grapes
- Grape clusters
- Woven baskets
- Picnic blankets
- Glass bottles
- White plates or light-colored utensils
- Grass, tree shadows, natural sunlight
- Minimal tabletop or picnic arrangements

The background should be softly blurred, with a natural and realistic atmosphere featuring dappled light from sunlight passing through leaves.

---

## 5. 3x3 Grid Requirements

The output is a **3x3 grid collage**, separated by white borders.

The nine photos must feature the **same person, same outfit, and same theme/scene**, but each must have distinctly different:

- Facial angles
- Poses
- Camera distances
- Camera positions
- Expressions
- Hand movements
- Composition methods

### Key Requirements

- Do not have the face facing the same direction in all nine photos.
- Do not have almost identical expressions across the nine photos.
- Do not have only slight variations.

It should look like a set of behind-the-scenes candid shots captured continuously during a real photo shoot.

---

## 6. Pose Suggestions for the Nine Photos

The nine photos can include the following different states:

1. Sitting by the picnic blanket, holding a bunch of purple grapes with both hands, eyes closed and smiling.
2. Lying on the grass, head tilted slightly, looking at the camera with grapes scattered nearby.
3. Holding a single grape near the mouth, looking at the camera with a playful expression.
4. Half-body side shot, looking down naturally while organizing grapes in the woven basket.
5. Front-facing sitting pose with grapes, glass bottles, and a basket in front; expression is calm.
6. Close-up shot, holding a grape against the cheek with a relaxed smile.
7. Slightly turning back, holding a bunch of grapes with a natural candid expression.
8. Eyes closed, smelling or leaning close to the grapes, looking relaxed and happy.
9. Reclining on the grass or under a tree, holding the woven basket, looking at the camera with a gentle gaze.

---

## 7. Photography Style

The overall style is:

- Fujifilm camera texture
- Japanese film photography style
- Soft natural light
- Slight film grain
- Shallow depth of field
- Realistic shooting feel
- Fresh summer tones
- Purple grapes as the visual focus
- Clean imagery with a sense of life and youthfulness.

---

## 8. Visual Requirements

- High-fidelity portrait photography
- Natural skin texture
- No plastic skin
- No excessive smoothing
- No exaggerated beautification
- No over-sharpening
- No cartoon feel
- No illustration feel
- No CG feel
- No cheap studio photography look

entries.title: Cozy Night Living Room Candid
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a warm, candid, photorealistic vertical 35mm-style indoor snapshot of a cozy, slightly messy apartment living room at night. The main subject is a young East Asian woman with black messy hair and round glasses lying upside down across a dark gray fabric sofa, head near the front-right edge of the couch, one arm bent behind her head and the other relaxed outward, eyes closed or half-closed with a tired, peaceful expression. She wears a muted blue sleeveless tank top and light gray drawstring lounge shorts, bare legs stretched along the sofa, with a rumpled beige throw blanket around her waist and cushions nearby. The room should feel lived-in and intimate: stacks of magazines and papers on a chair and side surfaces, shelves full of books and records in the background, a low wooden coffee table on the right holding exactly three black remote controls and one ceramic mug, and a pile of blankets on an ottoman or floor cushion in the back. Include exactly three warm light sources: a large floor lamp on the left foreground, a small lamp on a cabinet in the rear center, and another glowing lamp near the right rear curtains. Use warm tungsten evening light, shallow depth of field, soft film grain, natural skin tones, slight motion softness, realistic clutter, and an unposed documentary-photo composition shot from above the sofa looking diagonally through the room. Avoid glamour styling; make it feel like an ordinary quiet night at home.

entries.title: The Dark Godfather Structural Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
[GPT-image2 Structural Prompt: The Dark Godfather]

### 1. Identity Transformation
- Base Identity: Take the facial structure from [Reference Image].
- Modifications: Age the face by 30 years, adding deep-seated wisdom lines and weathered, leathery skin texture. Maintain the stoic, unshakable gaze of a high-status leader.

### 2. Lighting Architecture (Key)
- Light Source: A single, harsh Vertical Top-Lighting from directly overhead. 
- Shadow Mapping: This lighting must create cavernous shadows in the eye sockets, making the eyes almost invisible in mystery. It should cast a sharp, long shadow under the nose and chin, highlighting the skull's bone structure for a "silent authority" look.
- Style: Extreme Chiaroscuro. 70% of the face must be submerged in absolute velvet blackness.

### 3. Scene & Composition
- Subject: The man is seated in a classic high-backed black leather chair. He is slowly and rhythmically stroking a dark, sleek cat on his lap.
- Foreground: Focus on the contrast between the weathered, powerful hand and the soft fur of the cat.
- Background: A pitch-black, minimalist study. Only a faint, out-of-focus silhouette of a mahogany desk is visible.
- Camera: 85mm lens, f/1.8, medium shot, slight low-angle perspective.

### 4. Color & Texture
- Palette: Desaturated color grading. Deep tobacco browns, obsidian blacks, and sharp amber highlights (#B08D6A / #1A120B).
- Texture: 35mm film grain, Subsurface Scattering (SSS) for realistic skin highlights, PBR texture mapping (no plastic feel).

### 5. Negative Constraints
- NO smiling, NO looking at the camera directly, NO youthful skin, NO flat lighting, NO bright backgrounds, NO vibrant colors, NO digital smoothness.

entries.title: Fujifilm Style Home Couple Portraits
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Based on the real photos of two adult couples uploaded by the user, generate a "Fujifilm-style Japanese home couple portrait 3x3 grid album collage".

Strictly preserve the real identity characteristics of the two people. Both the girl and the boy must clearly look like the original people in the uploaded photos, including face shape, facial proportions, eye/brow structure, nose, lips, jawline, skin tone, age, hairline, hairstyle features, and overall temperament. Do not turn them into Western faces, Korean studio styles, influencers, or over-beautified strangers. All 9 final small photos must feature the same real Chinese couple, captured from different angles, distances, and moments during the same home session.

## Visual Format
Generate a 3x3 collage with 9 small photos, overall 1:1 ratio. Use narrow black separator lines between photos, all placed on a black background, like a curated home photo album. Not a commercial poster or studio layout; avoid repetitive templates.

## Core Visual Style
Overall style: Japanese lifestyle photography, Fujifilm camera texture, real home couple portrait, candid shots, gentle, relaxed, quiet, and storytelling.
Focus on the colors and atmosphere of Fujifilm stocks like Superia, Pro 400H, or C200. The images should have low saturation without looking gray, soft natural highlights, transparent but restrained skin tones, slight film grain, slight shadow noise, and soft contrast. It should look like an air-filled, layered Fujifilm lifestyle photo.
Avoid: old iPhone texture, mobile compression, digital sharpness, heavy retro filters, commercial ads, or e-commerce styles.

## Character Relationship
The two are a real, intimate, and natural young Chinese couple. Each frame should clearly show they are a couple with a sense of familiarity and companionship. Interactions should be realistic and relaxed: leaning in, making eye contact, looking down and laughing, leaning on a shoulder, reading together, passing things, preparing food, adjusting clothes, seeing each other in the mirror, or watching from a doorway. Intimate but restrained-no grease, no eroticism, and no staged wedding-style acting.

## Expressions and Angles
The 9 photos should not all look at the camera or just smile slightly. Expressions must be rich and varied: giggling, being teased, looking down laughing, quiet, daydreaming, gentle staring, relaxed chatting, focused on a task, responding with a look back, closing eyes laughing, looking out the window, or looking at each other.
Facial angles must vary significantly. Do not repeat the same template. Use a mix of: front, semi-front, profile, looking down, looking back, looking up slightly, near-back, mirror angles, distant observation, and close-up life details. Each frame should have a new head direction and visual rhythm.

## Clothing Requirements
Do not use the original clothes from the uploaded photos. Change them into natural Japanese lifestyle outfits: low saturation, neutral colors, soft materials. Colors like creamy white, oatmeal, light gray, pale coffee, misty blue, or charcoal. Items include knit cardigans, soft T-shirts, linen shirts, loungewear, long skirts, or socks. Should look like comfortable clothes a real couple wears at home.

## Home Setting
A clean, tidy apartment with real life traces (not a model home). Include elements like curtains, wood floors, sofas, pillows, blankets, books, albums, cups, plates, plants, bed lamps, mirrors, or tables-all as subtle aids to focus on the couple.

## Content of the 9 Frames
1. Quiet by the window: Boy looks out; girl leans in naturally. Quiet atmosphere.
2. Reading on the sofa: Reading a book together; one leans on the other's shoulder.
3. Passing a plate: At the dining table, passing fruit; active movement and eye contact.
4. Kitchen prep: Preparing food; one cuts fruit while the other watches and laughs.
5. Doorway view: Observer's perspective through a door frame into the living room.
6. Bedroom touch: Sitting on the bed; girl adjusts the boy's collar gently.
7. Floor photos: Sitting on the carpet looking at magazines together; candid sitting poses.
8. Mirror fragment: Captured through a dressing mirror; adjusting hair or a brief look in the mirror.
9. Balcony pause: Standing by the sliding door; one looks out while the other approaches with a smile.

## Consistency and Stability
Keep facial consistency across all 9 frames. Avoid complex hand gestures (no face-touching or finger-crossing). The quality should include slight film grain and scanning texture to feel like a real set, not a perfect AI grid. Avoid digital artifacts, extra limbs, or strange text.

entries.title: 1980s Chinese Family Watching TV
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A realistic nostalgic interior scene of a Chinese family of four at home in the 1980s, gathered closely in the living room and watching an old television. The room is modest, warm, and slightly worn, with a documentary-style candid composition. Show 4 family members total: a father seated at the far left in a dark blue Mao-style jacket, a mother beside him in a muted purple patterned blouse, a young boy in the foreground wearing a blue jacket and olive trousers seated on a small wooden stool, and a young girl on the right in a pink patterned jacket with her hair tied back. All four are turned toward the TV with attentive, quiet expressions, seen mostly in side profile or three-quarter back view. Place a vintage wood-framed CRT television on the right side atop a dark cabinet covered with a white floral lace cloth; the screen shows a black-and-white broadcast with a single person speaking. Behind the family, include cream-colored walls, a large old Mao poster on the upper left wall, and a vertical red calligraphy banner near the center reading 四化宏图 振兴中华. Add a wooden cabinet beneath a frosted-paned window, with lace runner cloth, enamel cups, a floral thermos flask, small jars, and a small bust decoration. On top of the TV place a square analog clock and a vase of pink flowers. In the foreground, include a simple rectangular coffee table with a lidded enamel mug and a plate piled with peanuts. Use soft indoor tungsten lighting, muted earthy colors, authentic 1980s Chinese household details, slight film grain, and a natural slice-of-life atmosphere. Set the overall scene in a Chinese family living room in the 1980s, with four family members, watching a black-and-white television broadcast, in a photorealistic nostalgic documentary photo.

entries.prompt: A photorealistic candid street photograph of a young Russian woman running toward the camera in a frantic late-for-school moment, holding one hand near her chest and with a slice of toast in her mouth. Shot from an extreme low-angle worm's-eye perspective on a rough roadside in a modest urban neighborhood, making her appear tall against a huge uninterrupted deep cobalt blue sky. Use hard noon sunlight with crisp, dark shadows stretching across the dusty pavement. Include exactly 4 background pedestrians, slightly blurred and walking away or across the street, plus a few distant cars and low buildings lining both sides of the road. entries.title: Moody Censored Elderly Man Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cinematic black-and-white documentary photograph of an elderly man sitting indoors beside a window, shown in a tight side-profile composition from the chest up. He wears a dark wide-brim hat, a heavy dark coat or jacket over a plaid shirt, with long gray hair visible around his ear and deeply wrinkled hands clasped near his mouth in a contemplative pose. The lighting is low-key and moody, with strong shadow on the left side and soft daylight entering from the right through a textured mesh window screen. Include exactly 4 main visible elements: 1 elderly seated man, 1 wide-brim hat, 1 mesh-covered window, and 1 large opaque dark gray rectangular censor block covering the central face and upper torso area. The rectangle should be positioned slightly right of center, spanning much of the man's head and chest, with clean straight edges and no text. Use high contrast monochrome film grain, gritty texture, shallow depth of field, and an intimate quiet atmosphere, as if captured on vintage 35mm film. No captions, no watermark, no color.

entries.title: Urban Alley Mural Artist
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A cinematic, ultra-realistic night scene of a young male street artist painting a large-scale mural of a woman's face in a narrow urban alley. The camera angle is slightly low, creating a dramatic, powerful perspective. The artist has medium-length, slightly messy dark hair and light stubble or a short beard, giving him a rugged, creative look.

He wears a loose white t-shirt and casual jeans, slightly oversized, with a relaxed streetwear vibe. His posture is focused and engaged as he stands close to the wall, actively spray-painting.

He is creating a massive, hyper-realistic mural of a woman's face on a textured brick wall. The mural is incredibly detailed-smooth skin tones, realistic lighting, expressive eyes, and glossy lips-appearing almost like a photograph. Fine mist from the spray paint is visible in the air, catching light and adding motion and atmosphere.

The setting is a narrow urban alley at night, surrounded by tall buildings. The environment is gritty and textured-aged brick walls, paint splashes, subtle grime, and urban wear. Neon signs and distant streetlights cast vibrant reflections in teal, magenta, and blue tones, creating a cinematic, slightly cyberpunk mood.

Lighting is dramatic and layered: cool ambient light fills the alley, while warmer neon highlights create contrast. A subtle rim light outlines the artist's silhouette, separating him from the dark background. The mural is partially illuminated, acting as a strong focal point.

Atmosphere includes light fog or mist, enhancing depth and making the lighting glow softly. The scene feels immersive, quiet, and artistically intense.

Depth of field is moderately shallow: the artist and mural are in sharp focus, while the background fades into soft blur with bokeh highlights.

Style: hyper-realistic, cinematic photography, street art aesthetic, ultra-detailed textures, high dynamic range, subtle film grain.

Camera details: 35mm or 50mm lens, f/1.8-f/2.8 aperture, low-light photography, slight low-angle shot, natural perspective.

Composition: vertical frame (4:5 or 9:16), subject slightly off-center, mural dominating the frame for strong visual storytelling.

entries.title: 90s Retro Streetwear Fashion Editorial
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic fashion editorial scene of 8 diverse young adults gathered around a vintage urban newsstand kiosk with a bold "NEWSSTAND" sign, set in a gritty indoor street environment with worn concrete floors, dark industrial walls, and subtle urban details. Newspapers fly dynamically through the air in mid-motion, creating layered depth and energy with natural motion blur. The group is styled in coordinated 90s-inspired retro streetwear - oversized jackets, layered fits, sunglasses, caps, and muted earth tones. (olive green, brown, cream, navy). Composition is carefully balanced: one subject leans casually against the kiosk holding a newspaper, one sits confidently on a cream vintage scooter in the foreground, another rests on a teal scooter, while others stand or sit on chairs with relaxed, confident poses and subtle attitude. Shot from a slightly elevated angle (top-down perspective), wide 35mm lens, maintaining natural proportions. Lighting is soft cinematic with warm highlights and diffused shadows, creating a premium fashion campaign mood. Background includes scattered newspapers, a red fire hydrant, and industrial textures for realism. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic, shallow depth of field, crisp subject focus, soft film grain, natural color grading, high-end magazine aesthetic, 4K quality.

entries.title: Monochrome Fantasy Warrior on Mountain
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cinematic black-and-white widescreen photograph of a lone tattooed dark fantasy warrior-priest standing on a rugged mountain ridge, centered slightly right, facing the camera with both arms extended outward in a ritualistic pose. The figure has messy dark hair and an intentionally obscured face covered by a soft square blur, giving an anonymous editorial look. Dress him in an ornate black velvet cloak with heavy draped sleeves, metallic trim, and a dramatic shoulder mantle; the costume has exactly 5 prominent visible outfit elements: a black hooded cape, a polished metal chest plate with round studs, layered chain straps across the torso, a wide belt with circular medallions, and a dark pleated skirt or kilt. His bare chest and forearms show dense tattoos, and his hands hold thin dangling cords or straps. Place him outdoors on a steep rocky hillside with a large dark mountain slope rising on the right, a hazy valley stretching into the distance on the left, sparse grass in the foreground, and exactly 3 small soft clouds in the sky. Use high-contrast analog film photography, shallow depth of field, visible film grain, natural daylight, dramatic shadows, and a slightly low-angle heroic composition. The mood should feel mystical, pagan, and theatrical, like a fashion editorial shot in a remote wilderness. No text, no watermark, no modern buildings, no extra people.

entries.title: Double Exposure Ocean Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Double exposure portrait on medium format film, meticulously crafted as an in-camera analog composite with two balanced exposures: first exposure captures powerful ocean waves crashing against a rugged rocky shoreline during golden hour, luminous sunset light casting warm amber and soft rose highlights through sea spray; second exposure features an elegant woman with long flowing dark hair in clean side profile, posed against a deep black seamless studio backdrop with subtle rim lighting defining her silhouette. The seascape organically fills and contours her hair, shoulders, and upper torso, blending naturally into her form so that waves become strands of motion and emotion, with foam, spray, and shoreline textures merging into her profile. Emphasize graceful composition, emotional depth, and visual poetry-romantic, painterly, melancholic, cinematic. Soft yet detailed tonal transitions, rich film grain, gentle halation, nuanced shadow depth, luminous highlights, dreamy analog imperfections, medium-format shallowness, and exquisite layered transparency. Shot on Pentax 67 with Portra 800 pushed +1 stop, each exposure metered at −1 EV for balanced density and preserved highlights. Fine art editorial aesthetic, timeless, ethereal, moody, sophisticated, museum-quality photographic print.

entries.title: French New Wave Protest Film Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vintage French New Wave political cinema poster as a torn-paper collage, vertical one-sheet composition, aged and distressed like a weathered 1968 street poster pasted on a wall. Use a limited palette of cream paper, faded black, deep red, mustard yellow, and muted cobalt blue, with heavy analog film grain, halftone print texture, ink bleed, fold creases, scratches, rough paper fibers, ripped edges, glue stains, and slightly misregistered letterpress typography. In the center, place a large black-and-white portrait of a brooding young man in a dark coat, seen in three-quarter profile, cropped from chest up, with curly dark hair and his face partially obscured by a rectangular censor-like paper block, giving the image a mysterious art-house feel. Surround the portrait with torn collage fragments: at upper left, a red paper panel with a black silhouette of a running protester; beneath it, a narrow off-white text strip reading "PARIS, MAI 68" and smaller French copy "LES MURS ONT DES OREILLES, L'AVENIR AUSSI."; along the far left edge, a vertical black film-strip border with "36 KODAK TRI-X PAN FILM" in white; at lower left, a mustard-yellow torn panel with a cropped dark silhouette portrait; at upper right, a blue torn panel containing the quote "UN FILM COUP DE POING ET DE POÉSIE." with "- CAHIERS DU CINÉMA" below; directly below that, a tall black-and-white photo fragment of a lone figure walking down a wet Paris street at night under lampposts; near the middle-right, a small torn newsprint block with the French slogan "LA BEAUTÉ EST DANS LA RUE" above a crowd scene; at lower right, a red torn panel with a black silhouette of a domed Paris landmark. Across the very top, centered in narrow black capitals, add the tagline "NOT EVERY REVOLUTION IS TELEVISED." Near the lower middle, in small black condensed type, add "A FILM BY JEAN-PIERRE LEMAIRE". Make the main title dominate the lower half in huge condensed red uppercase letters over torn cream paper: "L'HOMME QUI RÊVAIT". Directly underneath, in smaller blue condensed capitals, add the English subtitle "THE MAN WHO DREAMED". At the bottom center, place a black strip with large white condensed capitals reading "COMING SOON", and below it smaller text "ÉTÉ 1968". In the bottom left corner, include a Cannes-style laurel mark with "SÉLECTION OFFICIELLE FESTIVAL DE CANNES 1968". In the bottom right corner, add tiny production credits in French, including "UNE PRODUCTION LES FILMS DU SOLEIL DISTRIBUTION". Keep the whole design asymmetrical, raw, rebellious, and elegant, evoking Godard, Truffaut, May 1968 protest graphics, and handmade French art-house poster collage.
entries.description: A distressed 1960s-style French art-house movie poster collage for creating rebellious vintage cinema graphics with torn paper, bold typography, and political street-poster energy.
